  1. org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry
Spring Cloud Circuit Breaker Framework Retry support.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry used by org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry
    Class
    Description
    CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy
    A stateful circuit breaker implementation modeled after Spring Retry's CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy.
    CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy.State
    Circuit breaker state enumeration.
    FrameworkRetryCircuitBreakerFactory
    Factory for creating FrameworkRetryCircuitBreaker instances.
    FrameworkRetryConfig
    Configuration for a Framework Retry circuit breaker.
    FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder
    Builder for FrameworkRetryConfig.
